channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: New & Notable: A terrifically claustrophobic hip-hop album, …
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: New & Notable: A terrifically claustrophobic hip-hop album, WÜLF & CASHEW join forces to create a dense, Def Jux-y masterwork.
item.content:encoded: New & Notable: A terrifically claustrophobic hip-hop album, WÜLF & CASHEW join forces to create a dense, Def Jux-y masterwork.

item.title: Update: The U.S. and Iran are fighting for control of the S…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
Update:

The U.S. and Iran are fighting for control of the Strait of Hormuz, threatening a return to all-out war after agreeing to a ceasefire last month.
item.content:encoded:
Update:

The U.S. and Iran are fighting for control of the Strait of Hormuz, threatening a return to all-out war after agreeing to a ceasefire last month.

item.title: Social media can make a song go viral — even push it up the …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Social media can make a song go viral — even push it up the pop charts — seemingly overnight. Perhaps it's not surprising that some influencers are being paid to promote music without disclosing it.
item.content:encoded: Social media can make a song go viral — even push it up the pop charts — seemingly overnight. Perhaps it's not surprising that some influencers are being paid to promote music without disclosing it.

item.title: We’re live on @eastvillageradio.bsky.social right now! Tune …
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: We’re live on @eastvillageradio.bsky.social right now! Tune in as we explore Thailand’s emerging electronic scene, plus plenty of excellent new releases.
item.content:encoded: We’re live on @eastvillageradio.bsky.social right now! Tune in as we explore Thailand’s emerging electronic scene, plus plenty of excellent new releases.

item.title: New & Notable: Ragged country-tinged alt rock that revs up t…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: New & Notable: Ragged country-tinged alt rock that revs up the guitars, at times summoning the ragged glory of The Replacements.
item.content:encoded: New & Notable: Ragged country-tinged alt rock that revs up the guitars, at times summoning the ragged glory of The Replacements.

item.description: Is this the most frivolous lawsuit of the year?

item.title: People spend a lot of time outside during hot and humid weat…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: People spend a lot of time outside during hot and humid weather. Whether you're going to the beach or working your shift as a lifeguard, try these 7 proven ways to stay cool while outside.
item.content:encoded: People spend a lot of time outside during hot and humid weather. Whether you're going to the beach or working your shift as a lifeguard, try these 7 proven ways to stay cool while outside.

item.title: Morbid Angel founding drummer Mike Browning dead at 62
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Morbid Angel founding drummer Mike Browning dead at 62
item.content:encoded: Morbid Angel founding drummer Mike Browning dead at 62

item.title: Prisoners are allowed to file complaints about mistreatment …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Prisoners are allowed to file complaints about mistreatment — but doing so often comes with retaliation. That's according to an investigation by NPR and The Marshall Project.
item.content:encoded: Prisoners are allowed to file complaints about mistreatment — but doing so often comes with retaliation. That's according to an investigation by NPR and The Marshall Project.

item.title: NPR has learned that the Department of Health and Human Serv…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: NPR has learned that the Department of Health and Human Services will not be finalizing its most aggressive attempt to end gender-affirming care for youth nationally. n.pr/4w1lkb8
item.content:encoded: NPR has learned that the Department of Health and Human Services will not be finalizing its most aggressive attempt to end gender-affirming care for youth nationally. n.pr/4w1lkb8

item.title: New & Notable: A surrealist take on electronic music, the la…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: New & Notable: A surrealist take on electronic music, the latest from The Interlaken Tapes works krautrock and drone into their dreamlike songs.
item.content:encoded: New & Notable: A surrealist take on electronic music, the latest from The Interlaken Tapes works krautrock and drone into their dreamlike songs.

item.title: Just in: South Carolina's governor says he is appointing Da…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
Just in:

South Carolina's governor says he is appointing Darline Graham Nordone to finish the term of her late brother. Top Republicans, including President Trump, have coalesced around the pick.
item.content:encoded:
Just in:

South Carolina's governor says he is appointing Darline Graham Nordone to finish the term of her late brother. Top Republicans, including President Trump, have coalesced around the pick.

item.title: South Carolina's governor says he is appointing Darline Grah…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: South Carolina's governor says he is appointing Darline Graham Nordone to finish the term of her late brother. Top Republicans, including President Trump, have coalesced around the pick. n.pr/3RuDxyS
item.content:encoded: South Carolina's governor says he is appointing Darline Graham Nordone to finish the term of her late brother. Top Republicans, including President Trump, have coalesced around the pick. n.pr/3RuDxyS

item.title: Haute and Freddy released their acclaimed debut ‘Big Disgrac…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Haute and Freddy released their acclaimed debut ‘Big Disgrace’ earlier this year, and last night the theatrical duo of Michelle Buzz and Lance Shipp brought the album’s maximalist pop to Festival d’été de Québec, one of Canada’s oldest and largest music festivals. 🎪

[📷: Stéphane Bourgeois]
item.content:encoded:
Haute and Freddy released their acclaimed debut ‘Big Disgrace’ earlier this year, and last night the theatrical duo of Michelle Buzz and Lance Shipp brought the album’s maximalist pop to Festival d’été de Québec, one of Canada’s oldest and largest music festivals. 🎪

[📷: Stéphane Bourgeois]

item.title: New & Notable: This hauntingly beautiful new record from Haw…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: New & Notable: This hauntingly beautiful new record from Hawksmoor sounds blown in from countryside, eerily still and ancient.
item.content:encoded: New & Notable: This hauntingly beautiful new record from Hawksmoor sounds blown in from countryside, eerily still and ancient.

item.title: For some electric vehicle batteries, it costs more to recycl…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: For some electric vehicle batteries, it costs more to recycle them than they're worth. That creates all kinds of problems, which a new Colorado law aims to solve.
item.content:encoded: For some electric vehicle batteries, it costs more to recycle them than they're worth. That creates all kinds of problems, which a new Colorado law aims to solve.

item.title: Looking for something to listen to tonight? Tune into the Go…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Looking for something to listen to tonight? Tune into the Goin' Local Listening Party and be among the first to hear Lenny Kaye's debut solo album. Tonight at 7:00 PM EDT.
item.content:encoded: Looking for something to listen to tonight? Tune into the Goin' Local Listening Party and be among the first to hear Lenny Kaye's debut solo album. Tonight at 7:00 PM EDT.

item.title: Hundreds of masked white nationalists marched in the nation'…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Hundreds of masked white nationalists marched in the nation's capital on July Fourth. Who were they and where does their funding come from?
item.content:encoded: Hundreds of masked white nationalists marched in the nation's capital on July Fourth. Who were they and where does their funding come from?

item.title: More 👉 stereogum.com/2505029/beck...
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: More 👉 stereogum.com/2505029/beck...
item.content:encoded: More 👉 stereogum.com/2505029/beck...

item.title: The house band was Beck’s one-time touring group and his set…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: The house band was Beck’s one-time touring group and his sets included Elliott Smith’s “Needle In The Hay” (‘The Royal Tenenbaums’), the Bobby Fuller Four’s “Let Her Dance” (‘Fantastic Mr. Fox’), and Love’s “Alone Again Or” and Oliver Onions’ “Zorro Is Back” (both from ‘Bottle Rocket’).
item.content:encoded: The house band was Beck’s one-time touring group and his sets included Elliott Smith’s “Needle In The Hay” (‘The Royal Tenenbaums’), the Bobby Fuller Four’s “Let Her Dance” (‘Fantastic Mr. Fox’), and Love’s “Alone Again Or” and Oliver Onions’ “Zorro Is Back” (both from ‘Bottle Rocket’).

item.title: Karen O covered “Making Time,” heard in the 1998 film ‘Rushm…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Karen O covered “Making Time,” heard in the 1998 film ‘Rushmore.’ The Yeah Yeah Yeahs singer sang the Creation classic and the Stones’ “Play With Fire” (from ‘The Darjeeling Limited’) at the Hollywood Bowl’s tribute to the music of Wes Anderson movies over the weekend.

stereogum.com/2505029/beck...
item.content:encoded:
Karen O covered “Making Time,” heard in the 1998 film ‘Rushmore.’ The Yeah Yeah Yeahs singer sang the Creation classic and the Stones’ “Play With Fire” (from ‘The Darjeeling Limited’) at the Hollywood Bowl’s tribute to the music of Wes Anderson movies over the weekend.

stereogum.com/2505029/beck...

item.title: Album of the Day: Ferries, "Eye Wander." The anonymous band'…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Album of the Day: Ferries, "Eye Wander." The anonymous band's debut is the best kind of musical secret, a body-shaking mash-up of dub and psychedelia.
item.content:encoded: Album of the Day: Ferries, "Eye Wander." The anonymous band's debut is the best kind of musical secret, a body-shaking mash-up of dub and psychedelia.

item.title: Rashida Jones and Will McCormack met decades ago, when McCor…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Rashida Jones and Will McCormack met decades ago, when McCormack's sister set them up on a date. It didn't work out as a romantic pairing, but it was the start of a long-running creative partnership. n.pr/3SXlzpi
item.content:encoded: Rashida Jones and Will McCormack met decades ago, when McCormack's sister set them up on a date. It didn't work out as a romantic pairing, but it was the start of a long-running creative partnership. n.pr/3SXlzpi

item.title: We’re helping to get the word out about a great festival hap…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: We’re helping to get the word out about a great festival happening at the end of July. Get your tickets now for @soundwallfest.bsky.social featuring Ringo Deathstarr & more.
item.content:encoded: We’re helping to get the word out about a great festival happening at the end of July. Get your tickets now for @soundwallfest.bsky.social featuring Ringo Deathstarr & more.

item.title: “You just gotta go.” Water Damage and Setting embrace the ri…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: “You just gotta go.” Water Damage and Setting embrace the risk, repetition, and shared discovery at the heart of improvisation.
item.content:encoded: “You just gotta go.” Water Damage and Setting embrace the risk, repetition, and shared discovery at the heart of improvisation.

item.title: The move comes after the U.S. and Iran exchanged fire for th…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The move comes after the U.S. and Iran exchanged fire for the third weekend in a row, raising the specter of a return to all-out war after a shaky ceasefire took effect in June. n.pr/4hbNVpz
item.content:encoded: The move comes after the U.S. and Iran exchanged fire for the third weekend in a row, raising the specter of a return to all-out war after a shaky ceasefire took effect in June. n.pr/4hbNVpz

item.title: On this week's episode of Bandcamp's @eastvillageradio.bsky.…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: On this week's episode of Bandcamp's @eastvillageradio.bsky.social show, we explore Thailand’s emerging electronic scene, where traditional sounds meet house, dub, experimental club music, and more. Tune in today at 6 PM EST.
item.content:encoded: On this week's episode of Bandcamp's @eastvillageradio.bsky.social show, we explore Thailand’s emerging electronic scene, where traditional sounds meet house, dub, experimental club music, and more. Tune in today at 6 PM EST.

item.title: For nearly five decades, Mikal Gilmore helped document the a…
item.author: Discogs (@discogsofficial.bsky.social)
item.description: For nearly five decades, Mikal Gilmore helped document the artists, albums, and movements that shaped modern music. On Friday, July 17, at noon PST, collectors can shop the personal collection he built while chronicling rock history from the inside: https://disc.gs/4vqjUWt
item.content:encoded: For nearly five decades, Mikal Gilmore helped document the artists, albums, and movements that shaped modern music. On Friday, July 17, at noon PST, collectors can shop the personal collection he built while chronicling rock history from the inside: https://disc.gs/4vqjUWt

item.title: California is among the states suing to block Paramount from…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: California is among the states suing to block Paramount from buying Warner Bros. Discovery in a Hollywood mega-merger that would unite some of the nation's largest movie studios and TV newsrooms. n.pr/4peiT2k
item.content:encoded: California is among the states suing to block Paramount from buying Warner Bros. Discovery in a Hollywood mega-merger that would unite some of the nation's largest movie studios and TV newsrooms. n.pr/4peiT2k

item.title: These snakes can go for months without eating, grow and shri…

item.content:encoded: These snakes can go for months without eating, grow and shrink the size of their hearts and jump start their metabolism on a dime. n.pr/4peQXvc

item.title: Today we're taking a look at our Discord server’s top albums…
item.author: Record Club (@record.club)
item.description:
Today we're taking a look at our Discord server’s top albums. Are any of these in your current rotation? Any you haven’t listened to? Let us know below in the comments.

For a comprehensive list of releases or to see what the community is saying, head to record.club and join the conversation now.
item.content:encoded:
Today we're taking a look at our Discord server’s top albums. Are any of these in your current rotation? Any you haven’t listened to? Let us know below in the comments.

For a comprehensive list of releases or to see what the community is saying, head to record.club and join the conversation now.

item.title: The U.S. and Iran exchanged fire over the weekend amid tensi…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The U.S. and Iran exchanged fire over the weekend amid tensions over the Strait of Hormuz. And, Congress returns from recess facing tight deadlines. n.pr/4gBsr5l
item.content:encoded: The U.S. and Iran exchanged fire over the weekend amid tensions over the Strait of Hormuz. And, Congress returns from recess facing tight deadlines. n.pr/4gBsr5l
